steps.t: Harlanc is located south of Bâr Húrin. You should enter the central building in the ruins at Harlanc.
Harlanc is located south of Bâr Húrin. You should enter the central building in the ruins at Harlanc.
Harlanc is located south of Bâr Húrin. You should retrieve Ranger supplies from within the ruins at Harlanc.
Thurindol can be found in the keep at Bâr Húrin. You should return the Ranger supplies you recovered to Thurindol.
